title: Awakening from the Meaning Crisis — Ep. 4
subtitle: Socrates, Aporia, and the decoupling of Truth and Relevance

nodes.label: Natural Philosophers
nodes.summary: seeking objective facts about the physical world

nodes.label: The Sophists
nodes.summary: masters of rhetoric, persuasion, and power

nodes.label: Truth without Relevance
nodes.summary: facts that do not transform how you live

nodes.label: Relevance without Truth
nodes.summary: bullshit: prioritizing what is salient over what is real

nodes.label: Self-Deception
nodes.summary: the perennial human trap of pursuing false salience

nodes.label: Socrates
nodes.summary: the midwife of wisdom, knowing what he does not know

nodes.label: Elenchus (Socratic Method)
nodes.summary: questioning to strip away false knowledge

nodes.label: Aporia
nodes.summary: the state of shock, realization of ignorance, and insight

nodes.label: Wisdom
nodes.summary: the tight coupling of truth machinery and relevance machinery

annotations.text: Wisdom is not accumulating facts; it is protecting yourself from the bullshit of your own mind.
